subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-01-27 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: Consider the places where God has taken us--how He has made us wanderers upon the plains and across the seas. Truly, this passage from Hafiz
subcodes.first_line_orig: به بین خدا ما را بکجاها کشانیده چگونه آوارهٴ صحرا و دریا کرده فی الحقیقه این قول حافظ
subcodes.subjects: @poems and quotation from poetry, @suffering and imprisonment
